sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS PROFESSIONAL FOOTBALL.  FIND OUT THE OTHER CALLER'S FAVORITE PRO FOOTBALL TEAM AND WHERE IT'S HEADED THIS YEAR.       DO YOU AGREE WITH THE CALLER'S PREDICTION?
turns:
So, what's your favorite professional football team?

번역결과  
환영합니다!
Well, I've always been a big fan of the New England Patriots.
That's great! They have a pretty impressive track record. How do you think they'll do this season?
I believe they're going to have another strong year. Tom Brady still has it, and Bill Belichick never fails to make adjustments.
Yeah, I agree. Their consistency over the years is incredible. What about you?
Me? I follow the Dallas Cowboys. I'm optimistic about them this season as well.
Nice! The Cowboys have a lot of talent. Do you think they'll finally break through and win a Super Bowl?
Absolutely. With Dak Prescott leading the team and Ezekiel Elliott playing at his best, I think they have a good shot at it this time around.
Definitely possible. It could be an exciting season for them. Thanks for chatting with me today!

Likewise! Have a great day!

번역결료 : 당연히입니다.
그들은 수년에 걸쳐 지속적인 성공을 이룬 유명한 팀입니다, 어떻게 보시나요?
